title: parallax frozen slice manifest (machine-readable)
description: Frozen at spec-freeze (commands/spec.md step 10) and committed to .parallax/<slug>/slices.lock — the authoritative, machine-readable set of slice ids for the feature, parsed from the frozen slices.md. epic-gate.py requires the run-state's slice set to EQUAL this set EXACTLY, so a run (or a tampered run-state) cannot silently drop or add a slice relative to what was frozen. It is written once at freeze and never edited.

slug.description: The feature slug this manifest belongs to (must match the feature being promoted).

slices.description: Every slice id the frozen spec defines, e.g. ["S1","S2","S3"]. The gate requires run-state's integrated slices to be exactly this set.
